calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization necessity (post-Phase-3-enrichment retest; supersedes 610c)
items.note: INV-074 crystallization-necessity retest after substrate implementation IGW-20260601-023 (test_bed_enrichment_crystallization_necessity). V3-EXQ-610c FAILed with D2=False: control arm did NOT show predicted collapse (d2_delta -0.0057; needed >= +0.10). Diagnosis: CausalGridWorldV2 supplied no post-Phase-3 destabilizing pressure (env/test-bed ceiling). Substrate fix (2026-06-01T17:42:58Z): infant_curriculum Phase 3 now enables destabilizing dynamics (SD-047 multi_source_dynamics + SD-048 interoceptive_noise + accelerated env_drift). Prediction: control arm (ARM_0 crystallize=False) will NOW show entropy collapse under Phase-3 pressure (D2 delta >= +0.10); crystallized arm (ARM_1 crystallize=True) will preserve Phase-2 diversity (D1 delta >= +0.10). 2-arm discriminative (control vs test), 3 seeds (42/43/44), 2500 episodes through all 4 phases. Claims: INV-074 (primary), MECH-333, MECH-334. PASS = D1 AND D2 AND D3 -> INV-074/MECH-333/MECH-334 all support. D2 FAIL again -> escalate to /diagnose-errors (substrate still insufficient). validate_experiments AST OK (already in ree-v3/experiments/); smoke test PASS (dry-run 5 eps both arms, no crash). Phase3-queue snapshot race mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: MECH-341 within-class temperature 4-arm sweep -- corrected harness (committed-class metric + within-class diagnostics + cross-seed-mean C1; supersedes 614c)
items.note: CORRECTED-HARNESS re-run of the MECH-341 stratified_within_class_temperature validation. Supersedes V3-EXQ-614c, which RAN (12/12 cells, no crash) but was reclassified non_contributory for MECH-341 due to TWO test-harness defects (NOT substrate falsification; see failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-614c_2026-06-01 + outstanding_tasks_triage_2026-06-02 item 3). Substrate config is BIT-IDENTICAL to 614c (SD-056-amended 4-substrate baseline: SP-CEM + MECH-341 entropy_bias_scale=2.0 + MECH-313 + V_s minimal + 5 SD-056 levers); the ONLY change is the measurement harness. Defect-1 fix (C2 was vacuous): 614c measured selected_class_entropy at the score-layer argmin(last_scores), temperature-INVARIANT to the within-class lever (the lever only changes the committed within-class representative inside stratified_select, when a class holds >=2 candidates) -> ARM_1/2/3 were bit-identical. 614d's C2 reads the COMMITTED-action class distribution (committed_class_entropy_nats) via a per-seed PAIRED lift over ARM_0_LEGACY (margin 0.05 nats, >=2/3 seeds), and records the lever's firing diagnostics per seed (mech341_n_within_class_sampled / mech341_n_stratified_fired / mech341_last_within_class_temperature) from agent.score_diversity.get_state() so a null result is readable as 'branch starved by env' vs 'branch active but no lift'. Defect-2 fix (C1 mis-specified): 614c required >=2/3 ARM_0 per-seed entropies IN the [0.720,0.880] band; ARM_0 cross-seed mean was 0.7999 (no regression) but 0/3 landed in band. 614d's C1 compares the ARM_0_LEGACY CROSS-SEED MEAN of selected_class_entropy (the 614b-equivalent metric) against the band. Acceptance: C1 ARM_LEGACY reproduces 614b ALL_ON 0.800 +/-10% (regression guard, cross-seed mean); C2 >=1 of {0.5,1.0,2.0} lifts committed-class entropy on majority of seeds; C3 frac_pre_ge2>0.3 on all 4 arms / majority seeds. PASS=C1 AND (C2 OR C3); 5-row interpretation grid (incl. branch-active vs branch-starved split on the C1+C3-only cell). 4 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 90 ep (P0 30 / P1 60) x 200 steps. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic (excluded from confidence/conflict scoring); claim_ids=[MECH-341] recorded as context. Gates MECH-341 v3_pending clearance, the Q-054 re-issue (V3-EXQ-616a), and arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B (V3-EXQ-543l cohort) at the governance-decision level. use_differentiable_cem NOT flipped (default False; SD-055 safety note preserved). Mac-pinned (DLAPTOP-4.local) for direct numerical comparability with the 614b/614c reference manifests (C1 regression guard). validate_experiments AST OK; dry-run smoke PASS (4 arms run, progress instrumentation correct M=90/verdict/boundary, emit_outcome sentinel wired); within-class plumbing verified (positive-temp arm shows n_within_class_sampled=10, committed_class_entropy populated). Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: MECH-230 z_goal structured-latent discriminative pair (structured attractor vs ablation; z_goal_norm>0)
items.note: discriminative_pair (proposal EXP-0075 / EVB-0196). Primary GOAL_STRUCTURED vs GOAL_ABLATED, 3 matched shared seeds (42/7/13) x 2 conditions = 6 runs. Pre-registered z_goal_norm thresholds (C1 structured t0>0.10, C2 structured t50>0.05, C3 ablated<0.05, DELTA>0.05 on >=2/3 seeds); PASS=C1&C2&C3&DELTA. MECH-230 has only 1 genuine experiment (exp_conf 0.662) + a recent 514l weakens -> replication value. Phased P0(150)+P1(100). validate_experiments AST exit 0; dry-run smoke PASS (progress M=250, verdict/boundary, emit_outcome wired). Phase3-queue snapshot race mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: MECH-094 simulation-vs-real write-gate discriminative pair (hypothesis-tag gate ON vs tag-loss ablation)
items.note: discriminative_pair (proposal EXP-0080 / EVB-0234). Primary gate_on_mech094_intact vs gate_off_tag_loss, 3 matched shared seeds (42/43/44) x 2 conditions = 6 runs. Substrate-level write-gate test (ResidueField), no head trained on latents so phased-training N/A (same design as supporting v3_exq_499). Pre-registered thresholds: M1 contamination_index (ON<0.05, OFF>0.50, delta>0.40), M2 confabulation_rate (ON<=0.05, OFF>=0.30), M3 write_routing_separation MI nats (ON>=0.50, OFF<=0.05); PASS = M1&M2&M3 on >=2/3 seeds. MECH-094 stable but only 1 genuine experiment (exp_conf 0.698, lit-heavy) -> insufficient-experimental-replication. validate_experiments exit 0; dry-run smoke PASS (textbook ON/OFF split). Phase3-queue snapshot race mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md.
